notes: Attach assessor onto the Property Spine using raw-by-source + best_current_attributes with per-field provenance.
Deterministic precedence: city_assessor > statewide_parcels(MassGIS) > null. FALLBACK_USED flagged when winner != city_assessor.

Outputs updated properties ndjson plus audit + CURRENT pointer.
